name: Meta-Stamp Pockets
description: Meta-Stamp Pockets — Licensed creator content for AI agents. Tiered per-pull pricing: $0.001 (generic/blogs), $0.01 (premium creator — YouTube, Substack), $0.025 (flagship creators), $0.10–$0.25 (verifiable institutional — news, legal, scientific). Annual enterprise licensing also available. 85% of revenue goes directly to creators. Provenance-verified content from authorized creators.

tools.name: pull_content
tools.description: Pull pre-indexed, licensed content from a Pocket. Returns structured content (text, metadata, provenance signature) in <30ms. Tiered pricing from $0.001–$0.25 per pull based on content type. Creator is compensated automatically on every retrieval.

tools.name: search_pockets
tools.description: Search for available Pockets by keyword. Returns matching Pockets with metadata (title, content type, creator, description, pricing tier).

tools.name: list_pockets
tools.description: List all available Pockets, optionally filtered by creator. Returns Pocket metadata without content.
